---
title: 'GreenWeb: Language Extensions for Energy-Efficient Mobile Web Computing'
author:
- Yuhao Zhu
- Vijay Janapa Reddi
categories:
- Show All
- Pre-2018 Work
topics:
- watt_wise_web
url_source: https://horizon-lab.org/pubs/pldi16.pdf
talk_source: https://speakerdeck.com/queeten/greenweb-language-extensions-for-energy-efficient-mobile-web-computing
code_source: https://github.com/yuhao/autogreen
journ: PLDI
year: 2016
contrib: Pre-2018 Work
image: featured.png
pub_number: 14
---
